examples: Perhaps then his anesthesiologist will become interested.
Expert airway management is an essential skill for an anesthesiologist.
You'll be awake during the entire procedure. The anesthesiologist is on vacation.
We actually talked to an anesthesiologist who saw the movie and gave his review.
"Yoga has given me strength, " says LaFleur, 66, an anesthesiologist who practices in Hudson, New York.
